subcodes.first_line: O captive in the Divine Path! The details of the grievous occurrence and distressing events - namely, the tragedy of Ardabil and its hardships [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر سبیل الهی تفاصیل واقعه مولمه و حوادث مزعجه یعنی فاجعه اردبیل و مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
